summary: S003 source-backed repo backlog is closed through S004-S008; S006's earlier not-deliverable result is superseded by the post-S008 S009 final gate.

Final API runtime/product gate covers task-pull contract/claim/query/lock/payload/ack/finish/finish-sync/terminal fallback, queue coordination, remote-orphan governance, and server-executor orchestration specs.
Final CLI gate covers task-pull once/run/config/executor/loop/runtime summary/cancellation/finish behavior.

API, CLI, and Web build/type-check prerequisite logs are green; final source changes after Web/CLI logs were limited to API specs/docs/board, and API type/build was rerun after the final API spec additions.
residual_risks: Background process-manager integration for running the foreground CLI agent under systemd/launchd remains an operator/deployment responsibility outside repo-owned code.
This gate uses automated API/CLI/Web build/type-check and focused runtime/product specs; it does not represent a live production deployment exercise.
